content:
SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
GROUP BY u.name
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 5
ORDER BY order_count DESC;
docker exec -it postgres_dev psql -U admin -d myapp
